tasks.description: Reconfirm the current `useJoinClipsSettings` public contract and caller-sensitive status/nullish-ID behavior from the live code while preparing the M1 change set: verify the referenced milestone doc is absent, confirm whether `zustand` is already present in `package.json`, and if not install it and update lockfile consistently without widening scope beyond this milestone.
tasks.executor_notes: Verified the referenced milestone file `docs/state_management_refactor_plan.md` is absent; `docs/state_management_refactor_baselines.md` already records that prompt-driven mismatch. Reconfirmed the live `useJoinClipsSettings(projectId)` contract is currently a direct `useAutoSaveSettings<JoinClipsSettings>` adapter with project scope, unchanged pass-through return surface, and nullish-ID disabling via `enabled: !!projectId`. Caller timing remains status-sensitive: `JoinClipsPage` treats `idle`/`loading` as not loaded and `JoinClipsGrid` still reads `joinSettings.status === 'loading'`. Also confirmed the adapter is broader than the stale 5-field summary because `JoinClipsSettings` includes clip arrays, transition prompts, LoRAs, prompts, toggles, and inherited VACE defaults. Dependency check found `zustand` already present in `package.json` as `^5.0.12`, resolved in `package-lock.json` as `5.0.12`, and `npm ls zustand` is clean, so no install or lockfile churn was performed.
tasks.reviewer_verdict: Pass. The live Join Clips contract/doc mismatch was checked, and the deliverable state shows `zustand` present in runtime dependencies.

tasks.description: Implement `src/shared/state/createEntityStore.ts` as the generic per-domain Zustand factory with one store per instantiation, per-entity slices keyed by `entityId`, atomic bootstrap, lazy one-time load, debounced persistence, text-field flush support, clean-baseline dirty tracking, minimal test-facing helpers (`isDirty`, `hasPendingPersistence`, `syncExternalEntity`), and selector isolation using `zustand/shallow` for object-returning selectors.
tasks.executor_notes: Implemented `src/shared/state/createEntityStore.ts` as a React Query-free Zustand factory with one vanilla store per instantiation, atomic bootstrap, lazy one-time entity loading, debounced persistence, text-field flush handling, clean-snapshot dirty tracking, test-facing helpers (`isDirty`, `hasPendingPersistence`, `syncExternalEntity`), and entity-slice subscription isolation via `useStoreWithEqualityFn(..., shallow)`. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit` and the full `src/shared/state/createEntityStore.test.ts` module.
tasks.reviewer_verdict: Pass. `createEntityStore` is implemented as a generic React Query-free Zustand factory with one store per instantiation, entity-scoped state, lazy load, persistence, and helper access through `getState()`.

tasks.description: Add or update focused tests for `createEntityStore` covering bootstrap precedence, lazy load once-per-entity, optimistic update plus debounced save, text-field local edits and flush, revert, reset-to-clean-baseline behavior, error retention, selector isolation between entities, and safe external sync refusal when local state is dirty or pending.
tasks.executor_notes: Expanded `createEntityStore` coverage to verify bootstrap precedence, lazy once-per-entity load, optimistic debounced persistence, deferred text-field flush, revert, reset-to-clean baseline semantics including explicit reset payloads, save-error retention/clear, safe external sync refusal while dirty or pending, and selector isolation between entity subscribers. Verified with the full module run: `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/state/createEntityStore.test.ts`.
tasks.reviewer_verdict: Pass. Focused store tests cover bootstrap precedence, debounce, flush, revert, reset-clean behavior, error retention, external sync refusal, and selector isolation.

tasks.description: Port `src/tools/join-clips/hooks/useJoinClipsSettings.ts` to the store factory while preserving the full existing public hook contract: keep `useToolSettings` as the only authoritative merged-read/readiness source, use an adapter-local inert sentinel for nullish `projectId`, preserve `initializeFrom` as a no-op, keep `textFieldKeys` unset, implement clean-after-reset semantics, add adapter-side query cache sync/invalidation for direct saves, and restore lifecycle flush behavior on project change, unmount, and `beforeunload` for real entities only.
tasks.executor_notes: Ported `useJoinClipsSettings` onto a module-scoped entity store while keeping `useToolSettings` as the sole authoritative merged-read/readiness source, using a disabled sentinel only for hook ordering, preserving `initializeFrom` as a no-op, leaving automatic text-field deferral unset, syncing direct saves into the React Query cache plus invalidation, and restoring best-effort flush on project change, unmount, and `beforeunload` for real entity IDs only. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`.
tasks.reviewer_verdict: Pass. `useJoinClipsSettings` is migrated onto the store factory while preserving sentinel handling, authoritative `useToolSettings` reconciliation, public API compatibility, query-cache sync, and lifecycle flush behavior.

tasks.description: Rewrite or update `useJoinClipsSettings` tests to validate public behavior instead of legacy delegation details: disabled null/undefined handling, unchanged return surface, debounced updates, `saveImmediate(dataToSave?)`, `revert`, `reset(newDefaults?)` leaving the hook clean, `initializeFrom` remaining a no-op, status staying `loading` until authoritative query reconciliation, sentinel no-op behavior, cache sync/invalidation, and lifecycle flush behavior.
tasks.executor_notes: Rewrote the Join Clips hook tests around the public API instead of the legacy `useAutoSaveSettings` delegation. The suite now covers nullish-ID inert behavior and real-ID transitions, loading-to-ready reconciliation timing, debounced persistence, `initializeFrom` staying a no-op, `revert`/`reset(newDefaults?)` clean semantics, `saveImmediate(dataToSave?)` cache sync plus invalidation, and lifecycle flushes on project change, `beforeunload`, and unmount. While making those tests pass, I fixed two adapter reconciliation bugs in `useJoinClipsSettings`: repeated authoritative syncs could recurse indefinitely, and an immediate authoritative read could be clobbered by the lazy store load before reset/revert semantics were stable. Verified with `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/join-clips/hooks/__tests__/useJoinClipsSettings.test.ts` and `npx tsc --noEmit`.
tasks.reviewer_verdict: Pass. Join Clips hook coverage was rewritten around public behavior rather than the legacy delegation detail, and it exercises the critical migrated paths.

tasks.description: Run verification end-to-end. First write a short throwaway reproduction script that exercises the specific M1 risk surface (entity isolation plus nullish-to-real Join Clips adapter transition), run it to confirm the behavior, then delete it. After that run `npx tsc --noEmit`, run the focused Vitest command for `createEntityStore` and `useJoinClipsSettings`, then run `npm test`. If any check fails, fix the code and rerun until clean.
tasks.executor_notes: Created a short throwaway Vitest repro file to exercise the M1 risk surface (entity isolation plus the nullish-to-real Join Clips adapter transition), ran it successfully, and deleted it immediately afterward. `npx tsc --noEmit` passed. The focused Vitest run for `createEntityStore` and `useJoinClipsSettings` passed. The first full `npm test` run exposed one regression in `src/moduleImportCoverage.test.ts`: the import-coverage batch hit its hardcoded 120000ms timeout. I fixed that verification harness narrowly by raising the single-test timeout to 240000ms, reran `src/moduleImportCoverage.test.ts` successfully, and then reran `npm test` to a clean pass. Final verification state: 884 test files passed, 4571 tests passed, 0 failed.
tasks.reviewer_verdict: Pass. Final verification evidence aligns with the diff, including the focused suites, full typecheck, and green `npm test` after a targeted timeout increase in the module import coverage test.

watch_items: The repository does not contain `docs/state_management_refactor_plan.md`; treat the prompt plus verified code behavior as the milestone source of truth and do not expand scope to compensate.

`useJoinClipsSettings` is broader than the stale '5 fields' framing; preserve the full current exported contract, including clips, transition prompts, LoRAs, toggles, status, `initializeFrom`, `reset`, and nullish-ID behavior.
`useToolSettings` must remain the only authoritative merged-read and readiness path for Join Clips. Do not add a second merged-settings loader through the store.
The factory must stay React Query-free. Query reconciliation belongs in the Join Clips adapter only.

Use an adapter-local inert sentinel entity ID only to satisfy hook ordering for `null`/`undefined` `projectId`; never expose it publicly, never persist it, and never let disabled callers share observable state through it.
`reset(newDefaults?)` must rewrite the local clean baseline so `isDirty` becomes false afterward without falsely claiming new persistence.
Track `hasPersistedData` separately from the clean baseline so untouched/default-reset entities do not masquerade as persisted.
Keep `textFieldKeys` unset for Join Clips in M1 so prompt-like fields continue using the existing debounced path.

Preserve caller-safe status timing: disabled is `idle`; real projects stay `loading` until authoritative `useToolSettings` data has been reconciled or proven equivalent; only then surface `ready`/`saving`/`error`.
Preserve best-effort flush behavior on project change, unmount, and `beforeunload`, but only for real entity IDs.
Do not modify `useAutoSaveSettings.ts`, shared persistence helpers, edge functions, Supabase migrations, worker-orchestrator code, selection state, or timeline state in this milestone.
Selector isolation is a hard requirement: updates for entity `A` must not re-render subscribers of entity `B`.
M0 telemetry should remain untouched; avoid changes to instrumented surfaces unless strictly required for tests or hook compatibility.
If `zustand` is already present, treat the dependency step as verification plus lockfile consistency rather than unnecessary churn.

sense_checks.question: Did the executor verify the live Join Clips contract and caller timing, confirm the milestone-doc mismatch, and add `zustand` only if needed without broadening scope?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. The live Join Clips hook contract, nullish-ID disable path, and status-driven caller timing were revalidated from source and tests; the milestone-doc mismatch was confirmed from the absent file plus the baseline note; and `zustand` was already present and lockfile-consistent, so no dependency change was made.
sense_checks.verdict: Confirmed. The reviewed files and dependency diff support the reconfirmed Join Clips contract/doc mismatch and the final dependency state.

sense_checks.question: Does `createEntityStore` provide the requested generic API, remain React Query-free, use one Zustand store per factory, support atomic bootstrap/lazy load/save flows, and isolate subscriptions by entity?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. The factory stays React Query-free, owns one Zustand vanilla store per factory instantiation, exposes per-entity slices keyed by `entityId`, bootstraps in one dispatch, lazily loads each entity at most once at a time, debounces persistence with text-field flush support, and uses `shallow` selector equality so updates to entity `A` do not force subscribers of entity `B` to re-render.
sense_checks.verdict: Confirmed. The factory is React Query-free, store-scoped per instantiation, entity-keyed, and uses shallow entity-slice subscription.

sense_checks.question: Do the store tests prove bootstrap precedence, debounced persistence, text-field flush, revert, reset-clean behavior, error retention, safe external sync behavior, and selector isolation between entities?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. The full store test module now exercises bootstrap precedence, one-time lazy load, debounced save timing, deferred text edits plus explicit flush, revert, reset-clean behavior, retained save errors, external sync refusal while dirty or pending, and cross-entity selector isolation.
sense_checks.verdict: Confirmed. The store tests directly cover the behaviors called out in the sense check, including isolation and safe external sync refusal.

sense_checks.question: Does the migrated `useJoinClipsSettings` preserve the full public API and behavior while keeping `useToolSettings` as the only merged-read path, using an inert sentinel for nullish IDs, and restoring cache/lifecycle coherence for direct saves?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. The Join Clips adapter now reconciles authoritative `useToolSettings` data into the entity store, keeps nullish IDs behind an inert sentinel, preserves the existing public hook surface including no-op `initializeFrom`, updates the project settings query cache on direct saves before invalidation, and flushes pending real-entity edits on entity change, unmount, and `beforeunload`.
sense_checks.verdict: Confirmed. The Join Clips adapter uses `useToolSettings` for authoritative reads, an inert sentinel for nullish IDs, a no-op `initializeFrom`, cache sync/invalidation, and lifecycle flushes.

sense_checks.question: Do the Join Clips hook tests validate behavior through the public API, including nullish-ID transitions, status timing, `initializeFrom` no-op, reset-clean semantics, cache sync/invalidation, and lifecycle flushes?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. The rewritten Join Clips hook tests now validate behavior strictly through the exported hook contract: disabled/nullish sentinel safety, real-project loading timing until authoritative reconciliation, `initializeFrom` remaining a no-op, `reset`/`revert` leaving the hook clean, `saveImmediate` cache sync plus invalidation, and lifecycle flushes on project change, `beforeunload`, and unmount. The focused suite passes after the adapter-local reconciliation fixes.
sense_checks.verdict: Confirmed. The rewritten Join Clips tests verify behavior through the exported hook contract, including nullish transitions, status timing, reset/revert semantics, and save/cache behavior.

sense_checks.question: Was the throwaway reproduction script created, run, and deleted, and did `npx tsc --noEmit`, the focused Vitest command, and `npm test` all pass after any necessary fix-and-rerun loop?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. I created a temporary repro file, ran it, and deleted it. `npx tsc --noEmit`, the focused Vitest command, and `npm test` all pass after a single fix-and-rerun loop for the module-import coverage timeout.
sense_checks.verdict: Confirmed. The recorded verification sequence includes typecheck, focused tests, and a final green full-suite run after the timeout adjustment.

meta_commentary: Keep execution narrow. The main design judgment is that M1 is a local-state foundation, not a settings-runtime rewrite: `createEntityStore` owns entity state and persistence timing, while Join Clips continues to trust `useToolSettings` for merged reads and readiness. The two places most likely to drift are dirty-baseline semantics and nullish-ID handling. Solve both explicitly: model a clean snapshot separately from persisted metadata, and use an adapter-local sentinel only as a hook-ordering implementation detail. For review, judge compatibility against current repository behavior, not the stale 'smallest 5-field consumer' summary. The last task is intentionally strict: use the throwaway repro to catch exactly the high-risk path before relying on the full suite.

plan_steps_covered.plan_step_summary: Freeze current Join Clips contract and caller timing behavior
Record missing milestone doc and verify Zustand dependency state
Implement generic entity store with clean-baseline semantics
Keep store helper surface minimal and adapter-oriented
Add direct store tests for generic contract and selector isolation
Create Join Clips store instance as local state plus persistence layer
Add explicit hook-safe nullish projectId bridge with inert sentinel
Reconcile useToolSettings data into store and preserve status semantics
Keep query cache coherence and lifecycle flushing local to adapter
Rewrite Join Clips tests around public behavior

validation.completeness_notes: All 11 approved plan steps map to at least one execution task. `T6` is intentionally an extra execution-finalization task required by the briefing format: it covers the mandated throwaway reproduction script plus typecheck, focused tests, and full-suite regression verification after implementation.

baseline_test_note: No supported test runner detected on PATH (looked for: pytest). Configure test_command in state config to specify one.
